title: Rāmganj Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Rāmganj with a Z-Score of +3.26. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Rāmganj is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 82%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 13.1 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the impact of the heat wave.
